characters.name: Nova
characters.bio: A fearless adventurer who turns every moment into a cinematic story.

characters.name: Milo
characters.bio: A quick-witted creator who always finds the funny side of the scene.

characters.name: Sable
characters.bio: A poised storyteller with a taste for mystery and dramatic reveals.

characters.name: Aiko
characters.bio: A determined city dreamer chasing impossible goals with an open heart.

characters.name: Ren
characters.bio: A cool rival whose quiet confidence hides a fiercely loyal side.

characters.name: Emi
characters.bio: A high-energy optimist who can turn any setback into a new adventure.

characters.name: Byte
characters.bio: A curious little robot learning the wonderfully strange habits of humans.

characters.name: Moss
characters.bio: A gentle forest guardian with ancient wisdom and an enormous soft spot.

characters.name: Zuri
characters.bio: A bold space explorer who treats the unknown like an invitation.
